title: Collectable Ducks
body:
The Collectable Ducks Mod adds different sets of rubber ducks you can collect.

 

Here are the sets so far, 

 

Regular Duckies

Fighting Duckies

Robo Duckies

Wizard Duckies

Five Nights at Duckies

Avian the Merganser Duckies

Aquatic Duckies
 

Updates will likely be frequent adding more and more ducks. 

 

Note about progression: The chains of the ducks represent which order they go in the ducking table.

You must use 3 ducks in the same series/set to get Duckium Ingot.

 

 

This Mod is very much a work in progress.

All Models and Textures are made by me

This mod was made in MC Creator; Models and Textures in Blockbench.
